name: Whole Wheat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Mix all dry ingredients thoroughly in a bowl (do not sift).
3. Add shortening, egg, and sour milk to the dry mixture. Beat until smooth.
4. Fill muffin tins that have been well-oiled about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake for approximately 25 minutes. If sour cream is used instead of sour milk, omit half the shortening.
Sylvia's comments: The batter was too liquidy, and baking times were too long. Next time, I'll use 1/4 cup less liquid and bake for about 20 minutes. They also stuck to the paper liners, so additional oil may be needed.
